## Source / Release Boundary

- [ ] If this changes source evaluation, I identified the tested lane: browser source, native source, packaged artifact, or docs/setup.
- [ ] If this changes release readiness, I ran or preserved the relevant release/readiness check and did not claim public binaries or update feeds without evidence.
